title: Keyboard shortcut handler for design editor
purpose: Manages keyboard shortcuts for the design editor, including tool selection, undo/redo, grouping, zooming, and editing operations.

steps.content: Set up a keyboard event listener for the window.
Clean up the event listener when the component unmounts.
Handle keydown events to process various editor shortcuts.
Skip processing if the user is currently editing text in an input or textarea.
Handle single key shortcuts for tool selection.
Handle command or control key shortcuts for undo, redo, duplicate, select all, group, and ungroup operations.
Handle shift key shortcuts for zoom to fit and zoom to selection.
Handle shift key shortcut for toggling auto-layout on selected frame nodes.
Handle bracket key shortcuts for bringing to front and sending to back.
Handle delete and backspace key shortcuts for deleting selected items.
Handle enter key shortcut for committing pen paths.
Handle escape key shortcut for canceling context menus, pen states, text edits, and clearing selections.
Handle arrow key shortcuts for nudging selected nodes.
Check if the event target is an input element.
Check if the event target is a textarea element.
Return true if either of the above conditions is met.
